title: Crispy Russian Chicken Stir-fry
description: A spicy and crispy post-workout dish featuring sweet chili sauce, high in protein, perfect for muscle recovery.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (205°C). Pat chicken dry with paper towels.
Season chicken with soy sauce, ginger paste, and a pinch of salt. Toss gently to coat evenly.
Place seasoned chicken on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 18-20 minutes until fully cooked and golden brown.
While chicken bakes, mix together sweet chili sauce and peanut oil in a bowl; set aside.
Wipe out the pan used for frying if needed. Heat oil over medium-high heat. Add scallions, celery, and bell pepper slices. Stir-fry for about 3 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
Add prepped chicken to the pan and toss with sauce mixture. Cook for another 1-2 minutes allowing flavors to meld together.
Serve hot as a main course with steamed rice or noodles.
